name: Gems N’ Loans - Oceanside
description_short: Licensed pawn shop and gold buyer in Oceanside, CA offering collateral loans, buying, selling, and consignment. Open 7 days a week with bilingual staff.
description_long:
Gems N' Loans is a multi-location pawn and gold chain operating across Southern California. The Oceanside branch is located at 3753 Mission Ave #111 in Oceanside, CA 92058, and holds California pawn broker license #3710-0996. It operates as a regulated storefront serving residents of Oceanside with collateral-based financial services and pre-owned merchandise sales. The chain also maintains locations in Escondido and Temecula, indicating an established regional presence.

The Oceanside store offers four core transaction types: buying items outright, selling pre-owned merchandise, accepting goods on consignment, and issuing pawn loans using personal property as collateral. The shop places particular emphasis on gold and jewelry, prominently advertising a 'Get Cash for Gold' service. Customers can reach the team by phone at (760) 722-2762, by email at cesar.valdez@gemsnloans.com, or through an online contact form before visiting in person. Bilingual service is available in both English and Spanish.

The store distinguishes itself through seven-day-a-week availability, operating Monday through Saturday from 10:00 am to 6:00 pm and Sundays from 10:00 am to 5:00 pm — broader access than many independent pawn shops. Offering consignment alongside standard buy/sell transactions provides customers with a flexible option for items they prefer not to sell outright. The licensing information is publicly posted, and the website provides direct staff contact details, which adds a degree of transparency uncommon in the category.

However, the website does not disclose pawn loan interest rates, monthly fees, loan-to-value ratios, or the categories of items accepted as collateral. Prospective borrowers should inquire about these terms before visiting, as California pawn loans can carry high effective APRs. For consumers who simply need cash against gold or jewelry and prefer a regulated, licensed alternative to informal buyers, Gems N' Loans Oceanside is a viable option — but it is not a substitute for lower-cost borrowing such as credit union loans or personal loans for those who qualify.
pros: Holds California pawn broker license #3710-0996, confirming state-regulated operation
Open seven days a week, including Sundays (10am–5pm)
Bilingual service available in English and Spanish
Offers consignment as an alternative to outright selling
Multiple contact channels: phone, dedicated staff email, and online contact form
Part of an established multi-location Southern California chain (Oceanside, Escondido, Temecula)
Staff email and phone number publicly listed, enabling pre-visit consultation
cons: No loan interest rates, fees, or APR information disclosed on the website
No online loan application — transactions require an in-person visit
No item categories, accepted collateral types, or valuation methodology listed
Sunday hours are one hour shorter than weekday hours, limiting weekend access
No customer reviews, ratings, or testimonials visible on the website
best_for: Oceanside residents needing immediate cash against gold or jewelry
Shoppers seeking quality pre-owned merchandise at below-retail prices
Spanish-speaking customers who need bilingual pawn or resale services
Sellers who want consignment flexibility rather than an immediate outright sale
diagnosis: Gems N' Loans Oceanside is best for local residents who need fast cash against gold or jewelry and want a state-licensed, regulated environment with bilingual support. The primary caveat is that loan rates and terms are entirely absent from the website, so borrowers must visit in person to understand costs before committing — and should compare against alternatives if they qualify for lower-APR products.
services: Online contact form for customer outreach
